property_name: 夕凪 リノベーション古民家 寝室3部屋 海遊館近くusjまで20分 Nintendo Switch

reviews.summary: Went through a lot of struggle to finally get the key to enter. Can't have enough no. of beds.
reviews.positive: A great house that give you an experience of how local Osaka people live. A quiet and peaceful neighbourhood with resturants, supermarkets and convinient stores nearby.
reviews.negative: Difficult to contact the staff responsible. When the email system of Booking.com was not functioning well, the managing staff is hard to reach specially without a local phone.

reviews.summary: worth a stay if your ok with 14 min round trip to and from metro
reviews.positive: Cheap price for Osaka for a full house experience with multiple beds, easy access, cozy and quiet neighborhood (only tourist around), nice clean streets.
reviews.negative: 7 minute walk to the metro however convenient Life Grocery Store Open till midnight next to the metro.
